reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for player state animation and keep the same origin point across every player state.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_student_idle_8f_8fps.png through AssetServer during duel actor setup and cache the handle under player_student_idle_8f_8fps.
runtime_notes: Frame pivot stays at the standing foot midpoint so state swaps do not slide across the platform.
The player entity remains in world space while the hand cards live in Bevy UI space.
Animation timer ticks at 8 fps and loops continuously between casts.

context.usage: Default player stance while waiting for the enemy cast and deciding which card to commit.

shape.silhouette: Student mage with long academy coat, lifted focus hand, and a card hand held near the chest.

appendages.accessories: Focus bracer, crest brooch, and waist sash.

specs.texture: Layered cloth folds, enamel trim, and a small gem highlight on the bracer.
specs.shading: Soft gradient shading with a thin warm rim light on the right edge.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 960x180 px with eight 120x180 frames.
Idle loop keeps both feet inside a 20 px horizontal sway envelope so card hover UI does not overlap the silhouette.
Coat trim and wrist gem remain readable at full camera distance on a 1920x1080 canvas.
